items.question: Which printed page label has the figure/diagram in the section about 'D1.21.1 Implication of Exception levels implemented'?

items.question: How is a synchronous external abort on an instruction fetch handled?
Why is HIFAR an alias of the Secure IFAR when EL3 uses AArch32?
gold_answers: This is because when EL3 is using AArch32, HIFAR is an alias of the Secure IFAR.

items.question: What is the resultant shareability if stage 1 is Non-shareable and stage 2 is Outer Shareable?

gold_answers: Overflow floating-point exception occurred during execution of the reported instruction.
